creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
ports-mgmt/portmaster fails to perform at industrial load ;) 

portmaster -gdvy `find /usr/ports/graphics -type d -depth 1 | pkg which -qo | sort -u`

 leads to segmentation fault and output:

make: @/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.ldap.mk" line 43: warning: Couldn't read shell's output for "/usr/local/bin/ldapwhoami -VV 2>&1 | /usr/bin/grep ldapwhoami | /usr/bin/sed -E 's/.*OpenLDAP: ldapwhoami (2)\.(3|4).*/\1\2'"

infinitely repeating. guess it's more than just portmaster, somth like overflow somewhere...

 this junk is amazing, dears!)
